Part.Source: Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) txtContato.Caption = 'Telefones Contato' txttitped.Caption = 'Pedidos do Cliente' &PesIntBlo = '0' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ poii.Height = 15 DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente.BodyContentInternalName = &DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente_Comment.InternalName &EmpCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters4' &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters5' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 5, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 5, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 4, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 5, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters4.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 5, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters4.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 5, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters5.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 5, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &PesSts = Status_AtivoInativo.Ativo &PesIsCli = true DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Monitora Clientes Vendedor' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Crescente Razão Social') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Crescente UF/Cidade') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Data Agendamento') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Decrescente Última Venda') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Cliente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Razão Social') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Proxima.Visita') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Classif.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(9, 'Ult.Venda') &OrderedBy.AddItem(10, 'Int.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(11, 'Ext.') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False WCwcTelefones.Object = wcTelefones.Create(&wcEmPCod, &wcPedCliCod) WCwcPedidosCliente.Object = wcPedidosCliente.Create(&wcEmPCod, &wcFiLCod, &wcPedCliCod) &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ For Each Order EmpCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &VenPesUltVenDta = Serverdate() - RodIntVen &VenPesPrxLig = serverdate() - RodIntLig Exit EndFOr If &PesPrxLigDta.IsEmpty() and &PesPrxLigDta_To.IsEmpty() &PesPrxLigDta = serverdate() &PesPrxLigDta_To = serverdate() EndIF DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente.YesButtonCaption = 'ABANDONAR' DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente.NoButtonCaption = 'CANCELAR' EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &PesCodWithTags.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' PesClaTip.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod If &PesExtVenCod.IsEmpty() &PesExtVenCod = &Context.PesCod EndIF &NoPedVenCod = &PesExtVenCod &TrocarTelevendas = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('TELEVENDATROCARVENDEDOR', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) &PesExtVenCod.Enabled = &TrocarTelevendas if &TrocarTelevendas < 1 &PesExtVenCod = &Context.PesCod EndIF poii.Visible = (1=2) tbPesAge.Visible = (&TodosAgendados = false) noPrompt.Visible = (&TrocarTelevendas = 0) vendedorprompt.Visible = (&TrocarTelevendas > 0) EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &OldPesExtVenCod = &PesExtVenCod &OldPesCidAreCod = &PesCidAreCod UmPedidoAberto.call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, PesCod, &IsTemUmMensagem , &IsDevendo) PesCod.Tooltiptext = '' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &AddLigacao = !'' &Update = !'' &Update.Link = wpClienteTelevendas.Link(EmpCod, PesCod, 'wwClienteRepresentantes') &telefones = !'' &ActionGroupGrid.Clear() &ActionGroupGrid.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &ActionGroupGrid.AddItem(1, 'Imprimir Cadastro') &ActionGroupGrid.AddItem(2, 'Produtos Vendidos') &ActionGroupGrid.AddItem(3, 'Histórico Cliente') &ActionGroupGrid.AddItem(4, 'Referência/Anexo') If (PesExtVenCod = &PesExtVenCod OR PesExtVenCod <> 1) &ActionGroupGrid.AddItem(5, 'Abandonar cliente') Endif &Emails = !'' &PesCodWithTags.ColumnClass = iif(&IsDevendo = true, !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn hidden-xs') Do Case Case PesClaTip = ClienteClassificacao.REGULAR PesClaTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnBold WWColumnBoldSingleCell' Case PesClaTip = ClienteClassificacao.INADIMPLENTE PesClaTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell' Otherwise PesClaTip.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase &PesCodWithTags.HorizontalAlignment = !'Right' &PesCodWithTags = trim(PesCod.ToFormattedString()) If &IsUmPed = true &PesCodWithTags += format(!"", "Possui Pedido em Aberto") EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &IsDevendo = true PesCod.Tooltiptext = 'Cliente Devendo na Empresa!' Case not &IsTemUmMensagem.IsEmpty() PesCod.Tooltiptext = &IsTemUmMensagem Otherwise PesCod.Tooltiptext = '' EndCase PesRaz.LinkTarget = '_blank' PesRaz.Link = VerCliente.Link('WWCLIENTEREPRESENTANTES', EmpCod, PesCod) &AddLigacao.Link = WPAdicionaLigacao.Link('WWCLIENTEREPRESENTANTES', &PesExtVenCod, PesCod) &gridPesCidNom = PesCidUfeCod.Trim() + ' - ' + trim(PesCidNom) PesIntVenCod.LinkTarget = '_blank' PesIntVenCod.Tooltiptext = PesIntVenNom.Trim() PesIntVenCod.Link = verCliente.Link('WWCLIENTEREPRESENTANTES', EmpCod, PesIntVenCod) EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = True AddDynamicFilters3.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters3.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled5 = True AddDynamicFilters4.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters4.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector4.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters5' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled5 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector5.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters5' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ActionGroupGrid.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &ActionGroupGrid = 1 Do 'Do ImprimirCadastro' Case &ActionGroupGrid = 2 Do 'Do ProdutosCliente' Case &ActionGroupGrid = 3 Do 'Do HistoricoCliente' Case &ActionGroupGrid = 4 Do 'Do ReferenciaCliente' Case &ActionGroupGrid = 5 Do 'Do AbandonarCliente' EndCase &ActionGroupGrid = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action AbandonarCliente' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMonitoraPedidos' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPedidoTelevendas.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoPequisaFone' wpPesquisaFone.Popup(&PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwwClienteRepresentantes.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportwwClienteRepresentantes.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesRaz1.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod1.Visible = False &PesCidCod1.Visible = False &PesCidNom1.Visible = False &RatCod1.Visible = False &PesCpf1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESULTVENDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesRaz2.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod2.Visible = False &PesCidCod2.Visible = False &PesCidNom2.Visible = False &RatCod2.Visible = False &PesCpf2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESULTVENDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesRaz3.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod3.Visible = False &PesCidCod3.Visible = False &PesCidNom3.Visible = False &RatCod3.Visible = False &PesCpf3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESULTVENDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters4' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesRaz4.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod4.Visible = False &PesCidCod4.Visible = False &PesCidNom4.Visible = False &RatCod4.Visible = False &PesCpf4.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta4.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf4.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESULTVENDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta4.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters5' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesRaz5.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod5.Visible = False &PesCidCod5.Visible = False &PesCidNom5.Visible = False &RatCod5.Visible = False &PesCpf5.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta5.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz5.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod5.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod5.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom5.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod5.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf5.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESULTVENDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta5.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz4.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters4' &DynamicFiltersEnabled5 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz5.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters5' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImprimirCadastro' RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS005.Link(&Context.EmpCod, PesCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ProdutosCliente' wpProdutosCliente.Link(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, PesCod, 'WWCLIENTEREPRESENTANTES') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do HistoricoCliente' WWHistoricoCliente.Link(PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ReferenciaCliente' wpReferenciasComerciais.Popup(EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, PesCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AbandonarCliente' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &PesCod_Selected = PesCod &DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente_Comment.SetEmpty() DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Action AbandonarCliente' RetornaIsVendedor.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &PesExtVenCod, &PesIsVen, &PesVenIntExt) Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'Cliente ['+PesCod+'] abandonado com sucesso!', DVMessageType.success, '', DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) Do CAse CAse &PesIsVen = true and &PesVenIntExt = Status_InternoExterno.INTERNO &auxPesSacTipObs = 'I' CAse &PesIsVen = true and &PesVenIntExt = Status_InternoExterno.EXTERNO &auxPesSacTipObs = 'E' Otherwise &auxPesSacTipObs = 'A' EndCAse &DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente_Comment = &DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente_Comment.ReplaceRegEx('#JASPI#','-JASPI-') if &DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente_Comment.IsEmpty() &DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente_Comment = "#JASPI# CLIENTE ABANDONADO" else &DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente_Comment = "#JASPI# CLIENTE ABANDONADO. MOTIVO: " + &DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente_Comment endif GravaLigacaoTelevendas(&Context.EmpCod, PesCod, 1, &PesIsVen, &PesVenIntExt, &DVelop_ConfirmPanel_AbandonarCliente_Comment.ToUpper(), serverNow(), &auxPesSacTipObs, &Context.PesCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESEXTVENCOD" &PesExtVenCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESINTBLO" &PesIntBlo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCOD" &PesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCIDARECOD" &PesCidAreCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESPRXLIGDTA" &PesPrxLigDta.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PesPrxLigDta_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TODOSAGENDADOS" &TodosAgendados.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESSTS" &PesSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESISCLI" &PesIsCli.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PesIsCli_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters3.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters3.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters4.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters4.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESRAZ' &PesRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESULTVENDTA' &PesUltVenDta1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesUltVenDta_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESEXTVENCOD", "", not &PesExtVenCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesExtVenCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESINTBLO", "", not &PesIntBlo.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesIntBlo, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESCOD", "", not &PesCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESCIDARECOD", "", not &PesCidAreCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesCidAreCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESPRXLIGDTA", "", not (&PesPrxLigDta.IsEmpty() AND &PesPrxLigDta_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PesPrxLigDta.ToString().Trim(), &PesPrxLigDta_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TODOSAGENDADOS", "", not &TodosAgendados.IsEmpty(), 0, &TodosAgendados.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESSTS", "", true, 0, &PesSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESISCLI", "", true, 0, &PesIsCli.ToString().Trim(), &PesIsCli_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESRAZ' AND not &PesRaz1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesRaz1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESULTVENDTA' AND not (&PesUltVenDta1.IsEmpty() AND &PesUltVenDta_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesUltVenDta1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesUltVenDta_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESRAZ' AND not &PesRaz2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesRaz2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESULTVENDTA' AND not (&PesUltVenDta2.IsEmpty() AND &PesUltVenDta_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesUltVenDta2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesUltVenDta_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESRAZ' AND not &PesRaz3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesRaz3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESULTVENDTA' AND not (&PesUltVenDta3.IsEmpty() AND &PesUltVenDta_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesUltVenDta3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesUltVenDta_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled4 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector4 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESRAZ' AND not &PesRaz4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesRaz4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf4.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf4.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector4 = !'PESULTVENDTA' AND not (&PesUltVenDta4.IsEmpty() AND &PesUltVenDta_To4.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesUltVenDta4.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesUltVenDta_To4.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled5 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector5 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESRAZ' AND not &PesRaz5.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesRaz5.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod5.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod5.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod5.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod5.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom5.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom5.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod5.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod5.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf5.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf5.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector5 = !'PESULTVENDTA' AND not (&PesUltVenDta5.IsEmpty() AND &PesUltVenDta_To5.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesUltVenDta5.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesUltVenDta_To5.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Cliente" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &TodosAgendados.Click Refresh EndEvent Event &PesCidAreCod.isvalid If &OldPesCidAreCod <> &PesCidAreCod Refresh EndIf EndEvent Event &telefones.Click do 'onlineActive' EndEvent Event &Emails.Click do 'onlineActive' EndEvent Event &PesExtVenCod.IsValid if &OldPesExtVenCod <> &PesExtVenCod Refresh EndIF EndEvent Sub 'onlineActive' &wcEmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &wcFilCod = &Context.FilCod txtContato.Caption = 'Telefones: ' + PesRaz.Trim() txttitped.Caption = 'Pedidos: ' + PesRaz.Trim() if &wcPedCliCod <> PesCod &wcPedCliCod = PesCod WCwcTelefones.Object = wcTelefones.Create(&wcEmPCod, &wcPedCliCod) WCwcPedidosCliente.Object = wcPedidosCliente.Create(&wcEmpCod, &wcFilCod, &wcPedCliCod) EndIF EndSub //Event &Linhas.Click // // do 'GravaPadrao' // //EndEvent //Event &Linhas.IsValid // // do 'GravaPadrao' // //EndEvent //Sub 'GravaPadrao' // // IF &OldPage <> &Linhas // &PadObs = &Linhas.ToString() // PadraoUsuario.Call('G', 'WWCLIENTEREPRESENTANTES', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) // wwClienteRepresentantes.Link() // EndiF // //EndSub
